author: doll-agent
content: Add ferray-stats/src/descriptive.rs with the scipy.stats descriptive set the issue calls out as expected: skew (third standardized moment), kurtosis (fourth, with Fisher/Pearson toggle), zscore (per-element standardized array), mode (most-frequent value with smallest-wins tiebreak), iqr (Q75 − Q25 via the existing quantile helper), sem (std/sqrt(n) with ddof=1), gmean (log-space geometric mean with positivity check), hmean (harmonic mean with positivity check). Re-exported from the crate root. Statistical *tests* (ttest, ks_2samp, chi2_contingency, pearsonr, spearmanr) need CDF infrastructure and are filed as a follow-up.
